subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been sent down by the All-Merciful as a bounty from His presence unto him who desireth to quaff the choice wine of life eternal in this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن فضلا من عنده الی الذی اراد ان یشرب رحیق الحیوان فی هذا
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @spiritual transformation, @recompense; reward for belief; right action, @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
